entries.$comment: This is the next release, any changes here
entries.title: Version 0.0.0

changes.description: Fix --trust-all-tools being ignored in non-interactive mode
Windows support. Native install with full access to Kiro agents directly in your terminal.
Headless mode. Run Kiro CLI programmatically with an API key — full access to all tools and agents, now scriptable. Get your access key from https://kiro.dev/
UX refresh (GA). New UX is now the default with subagent monitoring (ctrl+g), real-time task lists, and stability fixes. Switch back anytime with kiro-cli --classic, or let us know /feedback.
Added confirmation and warning for --trust-all-tools
Fixed typing lag in TUI mode during long conversations
Tool calls no longer shown as running when resuming a session that was interrupted during tool execution
Fixed 'Prompt already in progress' error when cancelling a prompt
Fixed shell commands being allowed when toolsSettings deserialization fails
Fixed userPromptSubmit hook not included in message
Fixed max conversation length in agent crate to match v1 limit of 10000
Added /guide command to swap to the Kiro guide agent
Added /transcript command and Ctrl+T to open conversation in $PAGER
Added prompt details drill-in view to /prompts command
Fixed duplicate hooks causing TUI hang
Fixed crash when tool approval triggered in non-interactive mode
Fixed server-side token revocation on social logout
Fixed approval UX keybindings for arrow navigation, esc, and tab
Support @prompt syntax for triggering prompts in TUI and CLI arguments
Added Ctrl+R reverse incremental search to TUI prompt input
Added /hooks command in V2 TUI
Added /theme customization for code diff colors
Fixed --list-models not working without --classic
Fixed reverse search bugs: Ctrl+C, Escape, backspace after fail, up arrow context
Fixed viewport content preservation in scrollback on Ghostty
Prevent bun application crashing causing TUI issues
Added MCP registry support to V2 ACP code path
Fixed orphaned bun processes on terminal close
Fixed MCP OAuth mid-session re-authentication and token expiry detection
Fixed /tools reset not clearing all runtime permissions
Added /theme command to override theme colors for prompt and UI elements
Fixed long diff lines being truncated with ellipsis instead of wrapping
Fixed tmux pane title showing 'twinki:c' and APC sequence corruption
Fixed support for `--key=value` syntax and `--trust-tools` flag
Fixed /copy command only copying the tail end of responses that include tool calls
Fixed session-injected MCP servers being lost across mode swaps
Fixed Kitty protocol sequence leakage by draining stdin on exit
Fixed missing keyboard shortcuts in TUI input
Added UX for managing queued messages in V2 TUI
Fixed V1 subagent not having access to read files in the current working directory
Fixed IME input in terminal multiplexers by enabling hardware cursor
Fixed feedback URL being clipped and input filepath handling in V2 TUI
Fixed Ctrl+Z to properly suspend and resume the process in V2 TUI
The new TUI now supports all core features with the addition of sub agents, code intelligence and task management. Learn more: https://kiro.dev/blog/new-look-for-cli/
Added `/chat new` command in V2 TUI to start a fresh conversation without restarting the CLI
Add hooks.showStatus setting to suppress hook status messages
Fixed YAML frontmatter parsing failing on files with Windows-style (CRLF) line endings
Fixed panic on corrupted history file
Resolve relative and tilde paths in ACP file writes to display accurate diffs
Fixed spurious warnings when passing grep or glob to --trust-tools
Fix "profileArn is required but no profiles are available" error for some users
TUI v2 enhancements: /code command, /agent create & edit, filesystem path tab completion, terminal notifications, per-prompt credits/time display, OSC 9 support, and greeting settings
Fixed knowledge base include/exclude patterns not being applied during agent resource sync
Fix TUI/ACP /clear not persisting to session history, causing cleared messages to reappear on session resume
Support disabledTools configuration for MCP servers in ACP/TUI
Session & model reliability: saved model ID now restores correctly on resume, context size fallback updated, and session actor properly shuts down on terminate
TUI input & rendering: non-Latin character support, forward-delete key, column sizing with wide characters, and line wrap/link parsing
Fixed shell command trust patterns to preserve the original command path
Fixed prompt references not being resolved when passed to subagents

A refreshed UX (experimental) with live unified status, omnipresent input, and contextual overlays—try it with kiro-cli --tui. Learn more and share your feedback: https://kiro.dev/docs/cli/experimental/tui/
Add --list-models flag to non-interactively display available models
Added `/chat new` command to start a fresh conversation without restarting the CLI
Fixed --resume-picker silently falling through to new chat in directories with many sessions
Fixed Ctrl+C not interrupting glob and grep tools during large directory traversals
Fixed thinking tool infinite loop caused by single-event tool calls being silently dropped
Fixed todo lists being shared across concurrent sessions in the same directory
Added cleanup.periodDays setting to automatically delete old conversations, sessions, and knowledge bases
Skip unreadable files in glob expansion and isolate resource errors so one bad path does not drop all context
Persist CLI history after each input to prevent loss on crash or reboot
Include assistant response in stop hook event payload
Fixed trusted shell command patterns overwriting agent config's allowedCommands and autoAllowReadonly settings
Fixed certain git and npm commands being marked as readonly
Fixed subagent getting stuck when multiple tool calls require approval
Preserve valid tool uses in conversation history when retrying after invalid JSON in model response
Clean up MCP child processes on SIGTERM
Show agent names and queries in multi-subagent permission prompt
Fix agent loading to follow symlinks and deduplicate agent configs with the same name within a directory
Fixed knowledge search panic when snippet_length lands on a multi-byte UTF-8 character boundary
Prevent spurious agent conflict warnings when running from home directory
Prevent bash commands from hanging when processes access the terminal (SIGTTIN)
Enable embeddings on Linux ARM (aarch64)
Granular path trust for read/write tools - trust specific paths, parent directories, or workspace instead of trusting all file operations
Improved tool validation error messages to show required fields and hide internal details from user display
Reset context usage percentage on agent swap to prevent displaying stale values
Interactive agent selection for /agent edit and /agent set-default commands
session tool for temporary in-memory settings management
Improved MCP transport-closed error messages to be more actionable and transport-aware
Prefer $VISUAL over $EDITOR environment variable per Unix convention
Tree-sitter fallback for document symbols when LSP server does not support textDocument/documentSymbol
LSP client now respects server capabilities and dynamic registration before sending requests
Merged /agent create and /agent generate commands - /agent create now defaults to AI-assisted mode with --manual flag for editor-based creation
Fixed /agent list to correctly display source location for newly created agents
Added support for specifying agent creation arguments at invocation time, bypassing interactive menu
Added 'workspace' and 'global' special values for --directory flag that resolve to system agent directories
Fixed agents created with --directory flag being incorrectly placed in workspace folder
Improved --from flag performance during agent creation
Hide ASCII banner and UI noise in non-interactive mode
Agent edit command now uses temporary file validation to prevent corruption of original config
AI-assisted agent creation now defaults to global directory instead of prompting for location
Prevent raw mode panic when spawned with piped stdio and no controlling terminal
Subagent and ACP agent config system prompts now resolve file:// URIs relative to the config file location
Reset context usage percentage when switching to a model with a different context window size via /model
Ctrl+C now correctly interrupts and returns to prompt instead of exiting the CLI
Fix subagents not respecting the model field
Ctrl+C now restores cursor and kills child processes instead of leaving orphans
Fixed crash when indexing malformed PDF files in knowledge base
Reduced startup time by 1-2s on macOS by caching TLS certificate loading
Auto compaction for context window overflow errors
External Identity Provider (IdP) login support
Implement @file and @directory expansion for inline content references
Kiro unified entry point with `kiro-cli integrations install kiro-command-router`
Interactive shell prompts now display immediately without waiting for newlines
Handle context window overflow errors for Opus 4.6
Agent name is now a positional argument (e.g., 'kiro-cli agent create my-agent' instead of '--name my-agent')
Respect --no-interactive flag in subagent indicator
Skills from .kiro/skills/ and ~/.kiro/skills/ are now automatically available to the default agent
Show glob patterns in /context show output for easier removal
Agent edit commands now default to editing the current agent when no arguments are provided
KIRO_LOG_NO_COLOR environment variable to disable colored log output
Compaction failures in the subagent tool and ACP subcommand
Support agent lookup when filename differs from name field
Update the shell tool with a working_dir parameter to prevent the model from prefixing all commands with cd
Remove tool description truncation and warn about large descriptions instead
Agent name tab completion and ghost text hints for /agent swap and /agent delete commands
LSP client now reports clientInfo (name and version) to language servers
Display estimated token counts per tool and totals per origin in /tools output
Support --agent flag for the acp subcommand
Fix default agent loading for ACP
Add code tool for ACP and subagents
Fix /clear command showing garbled ANSI output instead of confirmation prompt
Deduplicate steering directory patterns in /context show when running from home directory
Enable /help --legacy <command> for command-specific help
Gracefully shut down MCP server processes on CLI exit to prevent leaked child processes
Add dynamic model tab completion with fuzzy matching and ghost text hints for /model command
Add chat.enablePromptHints setting to control startup hint display (default: true)
Enhanced introspect search algorithm for better accuracy
Agent Client Protocol support for ACP-compatible IDEs via kiro-cli acp command
Introspect now powered by comprehensive documentation coverage with semantic search
Enterprise governance support for web tools (web_search, web_fetch)
Agent list and swap commands now display agent descriptions
Welcome messages are now displayed whenever switching agents
write allowedPaths now works for both create and edit operations on systems with symlinks
add --require-mcp-startup flag to enforce successful MCP server startup
Knowledge indexing is now terminated immediately when the user requests to exit
Skill resources now show estimated size in /context instead of 0%
Enable case-insensitive history search in chat prompt
AWS tool supports S3 positional arguments for cp, mv, sync commands
Built-in help agent to explore CLI features and create configurations
Code intelligence now properly uses custom LSP servers for languages not supported by tree-sitter
Hook matchers now recognize tool aliases (e.g., 'read' for 'fs_read')
Improved tool validation error messages to show required fields and hide internal details from user display
Updated prompt and tool spec to expand agent capabilities
Custom diff tool support for write tool via chat.diffTool setting
Tab completion for @prompts now includes local and global file-based prompts
Improved code understanding with codebase overviews and smarter symbol navigation using Tree-sitter analysis. Learn details at: https://kiro.dev/docs/cli/code-intelligence/
Lazy loading for knowledge bases - loads on demand rather than all at once
Granular URL permissions for web_fetch tool through agent config
Social authentication support for remote development environments
Keyboard shortcuts for agent switching - Quickly switch between agents with custom keybinding. Learn details at: https://kiro.dev/docs/cli/custom-agents/configuration-reference/
Enhanced use_aws tool readonly operation identification & cli agent trusts readonly by default
Support progressive-loading of context files in custom agents
Subagents now correctly prompt for permission before running shell commands
/tools untrust now works correctly after /tools trust-all
/chat save and /chat load now support tilde expansion for better path resolution
Fixed a crash in the grep tool when searching files containing multi-byte Unicode characters
Persistent index for faster knowledge base loading
Refined context usage indicator to improve accuracy
Improved system prompt for compaction with UX enhancements
Removed write tool access for planning agent
Deprecation warnings for /save and /load commands now accept parameters properly
Added execution details for grep and glob tools
Disabled MCP servers no longer show as initializing
Inconsistent mcp tool name parsing between main chat and subagent
Makes subagent tool in default agent not trusted by default
Introducing Subagents - Delegate complex tasks to specialized agents with live progress tracking
Introducing the Plan Agent - a specialized built-in agent for breaking down complex tasks into implementation plans
New grep and glob tools for advanced file searching and pattern matching
MCP registry support for governance of MCP tools
Multi-session support with interactive session picker
Default agent prompt, highlighting Kiro CLI capabilities
/model set-current-as-default command for persisting model selection
Improve LSP loading time for code intelligence tools
Introducing code intelligence through LSP integration - kiro.dev/docs/cli/code-intelligence/
Knowledge Index with agent schema configuration for knowledge bases and auto-indexing support
Enhanced auto-compaction with deterministic read, write, shell and aws tool artifacts
Added guardrails for fs_read to avoid context overflow
Web Search and Web Fetch tools for accessing current information from the web
Kiro CLI automatically migrates some of your configurations from .amazonq to .kiro. Read the details at kiro.dev/cli-upgrade
Todo list improvements with task details and sticky active todos
/tangent forget command to remove recent messages from conversation context history
Knowledge base improvements with file metadata, limit controls, file type filters, and sort options
Migration now preserves shell file formatting and prevents configuration corruption
Kiro CLI automatically migrates some of your configurations from .amazonq to .kiro. Read the details at kiro.dev/cli-upgrade
Kiro-default agent showed no path found
Agent created in legacy folder
Add mcp with workspace scope sometimes failed
Inline code block color update

The Kiro CLI is here! Kiro CLI leverages the Kiro Auto agent to deliver the best results at the best price, in your terminal, and takes you from natural language, to code, to deployment. Kiro CLI supports different agent modes, MCPs, Kiro steering files, and custom agents, allowing you to mold the CLI to meet your needs.
Kiro CLI announcement. Learn more at kiro.dev/cli-upgrade - [#3433](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3433)
Right arrow key being disabled - [#3439](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3439)
Minor bug fixes
Enhanced `delegate` tool UX and mechanics - [#3337](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3337)
Warning when duplicate agents are loaded from the same directory - [#3335](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3335)
Block potentially dangerous commands from executing with the configured `execute_bash.allowedCommands` - [#3313](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3313)
Expanding `~` in prompt `file:://` URIs - [#3301](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3301)
Racing condition between prompting and printing - [#3308](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3308)
`/model` failing to load Sonnet 4.5 - [#3288](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3288)
Improved `fs-write` diff color contrast for dark and light terminal themes - [#3281](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3281)
Non-interactive chat output now correctly prints to standard output  - [#3277](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3277)
Issue with random characters printed before the Spinner  - [#3282](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3282)
Image paste support and `/paste` command - [#3088](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3088)
Improved UX for `q settings list` command - [#3167](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3167)
File:// URI support for agent prompts - [#3024](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3024)
PDF file support for knowledge - [#3151](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3151)
Support configurable OAuth redirect URI per MCP server - [#3124](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3124)
Fixes an issue with checkpoint feature, when starting multiple conversations from the same directory - [#3133](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3133)
Minor version reporting an old version
[Experimental] Agent delegate tool - [#3073](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3073)
Stop hook functionality - [#3070](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3070)
Unified show and status commands for knowledge - [#3052](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3052)
/logdump command - [#2539](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2539)
Experiment manager functionality - [#3054](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3054)
MCP prompts with no arguments - [#3018](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3018)
Model description under /model command - [#3057](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3057)
SSE support for MCP - [#2995](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2995)
Reloads only the built-in tools only for /experiment - [#3012](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/3012)
Add a `/reply` command - [#2680](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2680)
[Experimental] Adds checkpointing functionality using Git CLI commands - [#2896](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2896)
Validation issues with MCP tool arguments - [#2986](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2986)
[Experimental] Add context usage percentage indicator to prompt - [#2994](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2994)
Support for custom prompts, see `/prompts` - [#2799](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2799)
Various issues with MCP OAuth - [#2976](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2976)
Improve error messages for dispatch failures - [#2969](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2969)
Enhanced MCP prompt management with improved UX - [#2953](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2953)
Add support for preToolUse and postToolUse hook - [#2875](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2875)
Support for specifying oauth scopes via config - [#2925]( https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2925)
Support for headers ingestion for remote mcp - [#2925]( https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2925)
Change autocomplete shortcut from ctrl-f to ctrl-g - [#2634](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2634)
Fix file-path expansion in mcp-config - [#2915]( https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2915)
Fix filepath expansion to use absolute paths - [#2933](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2933)
Dashboard not updating after logging in - [#688](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/688)
Support for remote MCP connections - [#2836](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2836)
A new `/tangent tail` command to preserve the last tangent conversation - [#2838](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2838)
A new edit subcommand to `/agent` slash command for modifying existing agents - [#2854](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2854)
A new auto-announcement feature with `/changelog` command - [#2833](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2833)
A new CLI history persistence feature with file storage - [#2769](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2769)
Support for comma-containing arguments in MCP --args parameter - [#2754](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2754)
Support for configurable autoAllowReadonly setting in use_aws tool - [#2828](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2828)
Support for configurable line wrapping in chat interface - [#2816](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2816)
Support for model field in agent configuration format - [#2815](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2815)
AGENTS.md documentation to default agent resources - [#2812](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2812)
Reduced default fs_read trust permission to current working directory only - [#2824](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2824)
Changed autoAllowReadonly default to false for security in execute_bash - [#2846](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2846)
Updated dangerous patterns for execute_bash to include $ character - [#2811](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2811)
Path with trailing slash not being handled in file matching - [#2817](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2817)
Summary being erroneously preserved when conversation is cleared - [#2793](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2793)
A new command `/experiment` for toggling experimental features - [#2711](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2711)
A new command `/agent generate` for generating agent config with Q - [#2690](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2690)
A new command `/tangent` for going on a tangent without context pollution - [#2634](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2634)
A new to-do list tool for handling complex multi-step prompts - [#2533](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2533)
Agent-scoped knowledge base and context-specific search - [#2647](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2647)
A new tool `introspect` that allows Q CLI to answer questions about itself - [#2677](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2677)
Tool permission issue in agent - [#2619](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2619)
MCP admin-level configuration with GetProfile - [#2639](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2639)
Wildcard pattern matching support for agent allowedTools - [#2612](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2612)
Agent hot swap capability - [#2637](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2637)
Agent default profile printing issue in `use_aws`, plus minor doc updates - [#2617](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2617)
Knowledge beta improvements (phase 2): Refactored async_client and added BM25 support - [#2608](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2608)
Additional supported models in `q chat`, see `/model` - [#2419](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2419)
`--include` and `--exclude` flags for the `/knowledge add` command - [#2545](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2545)
Notifications on API retries - [#2607](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2607)
Support for setting denied shell commands with `toolsSettings.execute_bash.deniedCommands` - [#2512](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2512)
Support for setting denied AWS services with `toolsSettings.use_aws.deniedServices` - [#2512](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2512)
Support for setting denied file paths for `fs_read` and `fs_write` using `deniedPaths` in `toolsSettings` - [#2512](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2512)
Support for setting environment variables in MCP config - [#2241](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2241)
`q mcp add` from failing when the targeted `mcp.json` file does not exist - [#2561](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2561)
Regex matching for the `toolsSettings.execute_bash.allowedCommands` agent configuration - [#2483](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2483)
Support for workspace `mcp.json` configuration when `useLegacyMcpJson` is enabled - [#2516](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2516)
`/context show` to differentiate between agent and session context - [#2494](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2494)
Issues with `q mcp` subcommands failing - [#2475](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2475)
The `knowledge` tool always requiring permission - [#2501](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2501)
JSON schema support for the agent specification. Try it with `/agent create` - [#2440](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2440)
The `/profile` command - [#2468](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2468)
Tool permissioning not being reset - [#2469](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2469)
An issue with history compaction not being applied on context overflow
A new paradigm for working with `q chat` using agents. [See the documentation for more details](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/blob/main/docs/SUMMARY.md)
A new setting to disable markdown rendering in `qchat` with `chat.disableMarkdownRendering` - [#2223](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2223)
A new setting to disable markdown rendering in `qchat` with `chat.disableMarkdownRendering` - [#2236](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2236)
An issue with `/compact` failing for large initial messages - [#2375](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2375)
Images being removed from the conversation history - [#2333](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2333)
Code block detection for multi-line input - [#2384](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/2384)
Issues with `q chat` requests not being cached correctly - [#461](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/461)
Issues with read-only commands with the `execute_bash` tool - [#444](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/444)

(Experimental) Support for Sigv4 authentication with `q chat`. Launch chat with the environment variable `AMAZON_Q_SIGV4=1` - [#207](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/207)
An issue with authentication failing for long chat sessions - [#424](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/424)
Issues with parsing `/compact` and `/editor` arguments - [#425](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/425)
`q chat` inline prompt hints to be disabled by default. To enable, run `q settings chat.enableHistoryHints true` - [#429](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/429)
Extra options for history compaction in `q chat` - see `/compact --help` - [#402](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/402)
Issues with `/compact` - [#407](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/407)
Piping input into `q chat` - [#363](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/363)
An issue with `/compact` not being executed on context window overflow - [#365](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/365)
The `-a` flag to alias to `--trust-all-tools` - [#372](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/372)
Terminal bell support for the emacs eat terminal - [#357](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/357)
Autocompletion with ghost text in `q chat`. Accept completions using right arrow or `Ctrl + f` - [#288](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/288)
A purpose tag for the `fs_write` tool that summarizes the change being made - [#279](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/279)
The `/context hooks` slash command to `/hooks` in `q chat` - [#223](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/223)
`--trust-tools` to work with MCP tools in `q chat` - [#206](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/206)
Formatting for error messages on prompt retrieval from MCP servers - [#216](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/216)
File name extension inconsistency with `/save` and `/load` in `q chat` - [#289](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/289)
The default `q chat` model to Sonnet 4 for users in the IAD region - [#219](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/219)
Support for passing arguments to MCP server configuration in the CLI - [#262](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/262)
Support for disabling MCP servers with `disabled: true` - [#257](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/257)
Instructions on using `/prompts` in `q chat` - [#208](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/208)
Validation errors with `/compact` in `q chat` - [#224](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/224)
Issues resolving relative paths with `fs_write` in `q chat` - [#256](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/256)
Support for upgrading to a pro subscription with `/subscribe` in `q chat` - [#143](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/143)
`q chat` failing to launch in some Linux installations - [#169](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/169)
Model selection and Sonnet v4 support with `/model` in `q chat` - [#157](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/157)
Formatting issues with the `fs_read` tool in `q chat` - [#122](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/122)
Various issues in `q chat`
Server load timeout for no interactive mode - [#1851](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1851)
`chat.editMode` to tips - [#1900](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1900)
Unqualified tools from being included in the tools schema - [#84](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli-autocomplete/pull/84)
An issue where an early error from an mcp server will cause loading status to be terminated prematurely - [#1919](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1919)
Tools and prompts not being sorted - [#1809](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1809)
Various issues with `q chat`
An issue where `q chat` would prompt for login while already logged in - [#1862](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1862)
Support for FRA (region `eu-central-1`) for pro users - [#1333](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1333)
Persistent conversations by working directory with `q chat --resume` - [#1767](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1767)
Background MCP server loading in `q chat` - [#1775](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1775)
Image support in `q chat` - [#1489](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1489)
Git-aware file selection in the `q chat` fuzzy finder - [#1649](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1649)
Commands `/save` and `/load` for saving and loading conversation state in `q chat` - [#1762](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1762)
A new subcommand `q mcp` for updating MCP server configuration - [#1836](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1836)
An improved `/context show --expand` in `q chat` - [#1762](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1762)
A new flag `--changelog` to `q version` for displaying the change log from the CLI - [#1375](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1375)
Context files causing overflow in `q chat` - [#1331](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1331)
An issue with token overflow in the `/usage` command in `q chat` - [#1762](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1762)
An issue where non-interactive chat sessions displayed welcome banner - [#1437](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1437)
An issue where the `/context` chat command reference was duplicated in `/help` - [#1438](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1438)
Preferred default of fuzzy find to `ctrl+s` in `q chat` - [#1442](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1442)
Various issues in `q chat`
A bug where chat would sometimes become unresponsive
Model Context Protocol (MCP) support in `q chat` - [#1365](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1365)
Fuzzy finding support for selecting profiles in `q chat` - [#1388](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1388)
`/compact` to display the summary by default in `q chat` - [#1313](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1313)
Various issues in `q chat`
An issue with `/compact` failing in `q chat`
Fuzzy search for slash commands in `q chat` with `Ctrl + k` - [#1181](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1181)
A new capability for dynamically adding context to messages in `q chat` with "context hooks" - [#1218](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1218)
A new command `/usage` in `q chat` to display an estimate of the context window usage - [#1177](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1177)
A new greeting UI with rotating tips in `q chat` - [#1262](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1262)
An extra confirmation prompt before clearing the history in `q chat` with `/clear` - [#1180](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1180)
Support for using a system proxy with the `HTTP_PROXY` environment variable - [#1199](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1199)
The ability to reset a single tool's permissions in `q chat` with `/tools reset` - [#1102](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1102)
Various UI improvements in `q chat`
Arguments for `EDITOR` not being correctly parsed by the `/editor` command in `q chat` - [#1209](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1209)
The `/compact` command failing to compact history after the context window has been filled in `q chat` - [#1275](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1275)
Various issues in `q chat`
A new command `/tools` in `q chat` for granular tool permissioning - [#1054](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1054)
A new command `/compact` in `q chat` for summarizing the conversation history - [#1128](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1128)
A new command `/editor` in `q chat` for composing prompts using the configured editor - [#1035](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1035)
A new command `/issue` in `q chat` for creating new GitHub issues - [#990](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/990)
A new tool `report_issue` in `q chat` for creating new GitHub issues - [#974](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/974)
An improved context file display in `q chat` - [#983](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/983)
Optional terminal notifications on completed responses - [#1135](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1135)
An option `--non-interactive` to invoke `q chat` headlessly - [#878](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/878)
File name autocompletion in `q chat` - [#930](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/930)
Improved `execute_bash` pipe safety checking in `q chat` - [#927](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/927)
Executing `q` now enters `q chat` instead of opening the dashboard - [#987](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/987)
A missing Match criteria error in the ssh integration - [#1134](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/1134)
Various issues in `q chat`
Support for automatically adding files as context in `q chat` - [#834](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/834)
A search ability when reading the filesystem in `q chat` - [#811](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/811)
A larger maximum tool response size in `q chat` - [#850](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/850)
Detecting libc on certain Linux distributions during install - [#851](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/851)
An improved file diff in `q chat` - [#799](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/799)
Multi-line input support in `q chat` - [#831](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/831)
An append functionality with fs_write in `q chat` - [#764](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/764)
Support for WindSurf Next - [#814](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/814)
`ctrl+c` so that it exits `q chat` on first attempt - [#830](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/830)
Minor issues in `q chat`

An enhanced `q chat` with agentic capabilities. See the [announcement post](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/devops/introducing-the-enhanced-command-line-interface-in-amazon-q-developer/) for more information.
Minor issues
Support for Trae [#488](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/488)
Minor issues
Support for Positron [#406](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/406)
Self-updating for Linux AppImage builds [#410](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/410)
Extra lines in inline recommendations [#446](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/446)
Minor issues
Support for Ghostty [#335](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/335)
Support for Guake [#260](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/260)
Accept text through pipes in `q chat` [#259](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/259)
Support for WindSurf [#125](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/pull/125)
Linux SSH installations unable to update [#235](https://github.com/aws/amazon-q-developer-cli/issues/235)
`q translate` providing macOS specific responses on Linux
Support for Linux desktop. See the [AWS documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qdeveloper-ug/command-line.html) for more information.
Minor issues
Minor issues
Minor issues
Minor issues
Linux install script error
Minor issues
Frequent timeout errors in `q chat`
Bash integrations messing up prompt in ZSH child processes
Zsh integration errors when sourced via a non-interactive script
Minor issues
Setting to disable greeting in `q chat`, see [Chat](/chat) for the setting.
Using `tmux` is now supported in ssh.
Logging via the CLI would not show the "Use with Pro license" option.
Support for readline style input in `q chat`.
Pressing enter multiple times triggered `q translate` to immediately execute.
[PKCE-based authorization](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2024/05/aws-iam-identity-pkce-authorizations-aws-applications/) for login.
Menubar icon now indicates when there are issues with authentication or the app is not setup.
Added `quit` command to `q chat` ([#211](https://github.com/aws/q-command-line-discussions/discussions/211)).
AI-powered inline completions, see [Inline](/inline) for more info.
Login infinite redirect for first time users.
The "What's New" page with the latest release notes and announcements.
History loading for CLI Completions, press `ctrl+r` to switch to history mode. ([#57](https://github.com/aws/q-command-line-discussions/discussions/57)).
Support for [`generateSpecCacheKey`](https://github.com/withfig/autocomplete-tools/pull/105) for CLI Completions.

entries.title: CodeWhisperer is now Amazon Q
entries.description: Amazon Q Developer is a generative artificial intelligence (AI) powered conversational assistant that can help you understand, build, extend, and operate AWS applications.
